name: Subtick Inputs API
description: API for devs who want subtick input handling.

api-enabled.name: Enable Subtick Inputs (Master Switch)
api-enabled.description: Disabling this disables all subtick input features globally. Any dependent mods should (hopefully) revert to vanilla behavior.
api-enabled.enable-if-description: CBS and COS must be force disabled to use this API (see setting below).

cbs-disabled.name: Force disable Click On Steps and Click Between Steps
cbs-disabled.description: When this check is enabled, CBS and COS will be force disabled for every level, regardless of the vanilla setting.

debug-mode.name: Debug Mode
debug-mode.description: Enables logging for debugging purposes. Does not alter any functionality.

issues.info: Report bugs on the github issue page.
